config.noisium.title: Noisium Configuration
config.noisium.noiseChunkGenerator.toolt: Optimizes NoiseChunkGenerator#populateNoise for 20-30% speedup in world generation. Requires restart.
config.noisium.chunkSection.tooltip: Optimizes ChunkSection#populateBiomes axis order. Requires restart.
config.noisium.chainedBlockSource.toolti: Micro-optimization for ChainedBlockSource lookups. Requires restart.
config.noisium.chunkNoiseSamplerInterpol: Optimizes ChunkNoiseSampler#interpolateZ by skipping quarter-step cases (deltaZ=0.0). Requires restart.
config.noisium.useGuiGraphics.tooltip: Enables GuiGraphics-accelerated rendering paths when available.
